subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Devote all thy moments to the teaching of the Cause, and occupy thyself with awakening the heedless women, that they may [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله جمیع اوقات را صرف تبلیغ کن و بتنبیه نساء غافله پرداز تا ایشان را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
